title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Instructional Designer at WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Instructional Designer looking for your next big career move? WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd in Pimpri-Chinchwad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd:
WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WhiteHat Jr Consulting Pvt Ltd!
